concerns.text: T004 (JSON Schema contracts) listed before T007 (Pydantic models). T004 description states 'verify schema matches Pydantic models' — models must exist before validation. Swap T004/T007 order.

T005b [P] pins random seeds in 'code/born_calculator.py and code/regression_analysis.py' but these files are created in Phase 4 (T022) and Phase 5 (T031). Cannot pin seeds in non-existent files. Move T005b to after file creation or split into separate tasks per file lifecycle.

T009 [P] checksums 'ALL files under data/ and code/' but most code files (born_calculator.py, data_compiler.py, regression_analysis.py, diagnostics.py) don't exist until Phases 3-5. Checksumming non-existent files is impossible. Move T009 to Phase 6 or make it incremental.

Spec claims user stories are 'independently shippable' but T027 (US2) depends on T018 (US1 data validation) and T031 (US3) depends on T027 (US2 predictions). This violates the independent-shippability requirement. Either acknowledge sequential dependency in spec or restructure to enable true independence.
T043 validates quickstart.md but plan.md lists quickstart.md as Phase 1 output with no corresponding creation task. Add task to create quickstart.md in Phase 1.
